The Signal and the Noise. Differentiating Stylometric Signals in the Analysis of Literary Texts

Sep 28, 2020

My master thesis The Signal and the Noise. Differentiating Stylometric Signals in the Analysis of Literary Texts was published as the first volume of the new open access series Digital Philology. Evolving Scholarship in Digital Philology (eds. Sabine Bartsch, Evelyn Gius, Marcus Müller, Andrea Rapp & Thomas Weitin). You can find it here.

stylcoR is now available
